title: phlox carolina subsp. altissima
intro: Phlox carolina subsp. altissima, also known as Carolina phlox, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phlox carolina subsp. altissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
